info.title: Services Settings API
info.description: Write endpoints for managing business services. Read operations use GET /platform/v1/services; create and update operations use /v2/settings/services.

post.description:
## Overview
Creates a new service for the business. This is the write endpoint for services — the read-only list is at `GET /platform/v1/services`.

Available for **Staff tokens**.

## Important
`POST /platform/v1/services` does NOT exist (returns 404). Always use this endpoint (`POST /v2/settings/services`) to create services.

name.description: Display name of the service (e.g., "Executive Strategy Consultation").

service_type.description: The kind of service to create. Use `appointment` for standard one-on-one services (default) or `event` for group events/workshops.

duration.description: Duration of the service in minutes (e.g., 30, 45, 60).

charge_type.description: How the service is charged. `no_price` for free services, `paid` for priced services, `free` for explicitly free services.

price.description: Price of the service in the smallest currency unit. Set to 0 for free services.

description.description: A detailed description of the service shown to clients.

display.description: Whether the service is visible in the client-facing booking page. Defaults to true.

approval_mode.description: How bookings for this service are approved. `immediate` for auto-approval, `manual` for staff review.

staff_uids.description: Array of staff member UIDs who can provide this service.

data.name: Executive Strategy Consultation
data.description: A focused consultation for business planning.
